'''''Star Wars Tales'' 11''' is the eleventh issue in the ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' series of comics. It was published on [[March 20]], [[2002]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''It can't be easy being Han Solo...one minute he's winning the ''Millennium Falcon'' from his buddy Lando, the next he's being chased across the galaxy by Boba Fett and running afoul of Darth Vader. It seems like Han is always getting into trouble, but it's nothing a resourceful guy like Solo can't handle. This issue of ''Star Wars Tales'' puts the spotlight on Mr. Solo featuring various adventures, including a rare "young Han Solo" tale by Jan Duursema! Adventure and mayhem abound in issue #11 of ''Star Wars Tales''!''

==Contents==
*'''Introduction''': [[Standard month/Legends|Months]] before the release of [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']], ''Star Wars Tales'' editor [[David Land|Dave Land]] visits a line forming on the sidwalk in front of a theatre in anticipation of its release. Land discovers that the first position in the line is taken by a homeless person living on that sidewalk.
*"[[Prey]]"
*"[[In the Beginning]]"
*"[[The Princess Leia Diaries]]"
*"[[Tall Tales (Star Wars Tales)|Tall Tales]]"
*"[[Ghost (comic story)|Ghost]]"
